---
title: "Moinul"
output: 
 html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    collapsed: false
    number_sections: false
    toc_depth: 1
    #code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=FALSE,warning=FALSE, cache=TRUE)
```

I am Dr. Moinul Islam, working as an assistant professor at Kochi University of Technology. I have received my Ph.D. in engineering degree from Kyushu University in 2016. My laboratory focuses on development economics, experimental economics, environmental economics, and spacial economics.

The research method focuses on the following three points.

1. Development Economics 
2. Experimental Economics
3. Environmental Economics
4. Spatial Economics

I have extensive experience to conduct experimental research by using the methods of online experiment, field experiment, laboratory experiment and spatial econometrics. I use computer programming (Python), data analysis software (R, oTree) and geographic information system (GIS) for experimental research design. Based on the experimental data analysis, my goal is to identify and develop suitable policy framework that will contribute to the policies for sustainable environments and societies. 


# Development Economics

# Experimental Economics
Laboratory experiment, online experiment, and field experiment. Experimental economics is a rapidly growing field that is upgrading with technological advancements.

# Environmental Economics
Time series and panel data analysis

# Spatial Economics
Geographic information system for social science

Work Experience

1. 2020, Assistant Professor, Research Institute for Future Design, Kochi University of Technology, Kochi, Japan

2. 2019, Assistant Professor, Graduate School for International Development and Cooperation (IDEC), Hiroshima University, Hiroshima, Japan 

3. 2016, Assistant Professor, Graduate School of Urban and Environmental Engineering, Kyushu University, Fukuoka, Japan 

4. 2012, Research Assistant, Graduate School of Environmental Studies, Tohoku University, Sendai, Japan   

Computer programs
1. R, Python
2. STATA, EViews 
3. ArcGIS, QGIS 
4. oTree, zTree
5. GNU Emacs

Languages
English (Fluent), Japanese (Fluent), Hindi (Fluent), Bengali (Native)

External links

1. Kochi University of Technology: (https://www.kochi-tech.ac.jp/profile/ja/islam-moinul.html)

2. Publons: (https://publons.com/researcher/4127115/moinul-islam/)

3. Google Scholar: (https://scholar.google.co.jp/citations?user=UTZTmJ0AAAAJ&hl=en)

4. Scopus: (https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=55348122400)

5. Research Map: (https://researchmap.jp/moinul/?lang=english)

6. ORCID: (https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0309-3156)

Affiliation:

1. Research Institute for Future Design, Kochi University of Technology, 2-22 Eikokuji, Kochi City, Kochi 780-8515, Japan

2. School of Economics and Management, Kochi University of Technology, 2-22 Eikokuji, Kochi City, Kochi 780-8518, Japan

3. Urban Institute, Kyushu University, Fukuoka, Japan
